📝

Deutsch B1 Prüfung

Bereiten Sie sich auf Ihre Prüfung vor

Prüfungsbereich auswählen

Wählen Sie bitte den Bereich aus, den Sie üben möchten. Die Prüfung startet automatisch in 30 Sekunden.

Die Prüfung startet in:
30
Stellen Sie sicher, dass Sie in einer ruhigen Umgebung sind und genügend Zeit haben.
test

Verbleibende Zeit: 90:00

Frage
Nicht gespeichert

Deutsch - B1 (Übung)
Hörverstehen — Testbeispiel
Verbleibende Zeit: 17:00
Nicht gespeichert
test
Deutsch - B1 (Übung)
Schreiben — Testbeispiel
Verbleibende Zeit: 30:00

Aufgabe

Nicht gespeichert
B1
Deutsch - B1 (Übung)
Mündlich — Teil 1, Teil 2, Teil 3
Mündlich: 75 Punkte
0/75 Punkte
Teil 1/2 können automatisch übernommen werden. Teil 3 kann manuell eingetragen werden.

TELC B1 Mündlich — Teil 3

Status: Teil 3 wird jetzt aus dem ersten Mündlich-Datei geladen.

Die Aufgaben werden im Trainer-Fenster geöffnet. Falls der Browser den Inhalt blockiert, lade die Seite neu.

  • Aufgabe anzeigen
  • Planung mit Roboter üben
  • Antwort aufnehmen oder schreiben
  • Feedback + Punkte /30
test
Gesamtergebnis — Deutsch B2
Hinweis: Reihenfolge: Lesen → Hören → Schreiben → Mündlich → Gesamtergebnis. Schreiben (45 Punkte) wird automatisch bewertet. Mündlich (75 Punkte) wird über Teil 1/2-Trainer und manuelle Teil-3-Punkte gespeichert.
', scrollPanelsStyle + ' '); } function resizeMundlichFrame() { if (!frame || frame.style.display === 'none') return; const fixedHeight = document.body.classList.contains('mundlich-full-mode') ? window.innerHeight : Math.max(650, window.innerHeight - 104); frame.style.height = fixedHeight + 'px'; } function clampScore(partId, rawValue) { const max = partId === 't1' ? 15 : 30; const parsed = parseInt(rawValue || 0, 10); if (Number.isNaN(parsed)) return 0; return Math.max(0, Math.min(max, parsed)); } function syncInputs() { Object.keys(inputs).forEach(partId => { if (inputs[partId]) inputs[partId].value = clampScore(partId, state.scores[partId]); }); } function saveScores(showMessage = true) { state.scores.t1 = clampScore('t1', inputs.t1 ? inputs.t1.value : state.scores.t1); state.scores.t2 = clampScore('t2', inputs.t2 ? inputs.t2.value : state.scores.t2); state.scores.t3 = clampScore('t3', inputs.t3 ? inputs.t3.value : state.scores.t3); try { localStorage.setItem('mundlichScores', JSON.stringify(state.scores)); } catch (e) {} updateTotal(); renderTopTiles(); if (showMessage && statusBox) { statusBox.textContent = 'Gespeichert: Mündlich ' + getTotal() + '/75 Punkte. Diese Punkte gehen in Gesamtergebnis /300.'; } } function getTotal() { return clampScore('t1', state.scores.t1) + clampScore('t2', state.scores.t2) + clampScore('t3', state.scores.t3); } function updateTotal() { syncInputs(); if (totalBox) totalBox.textContent = getTotal() + '/75 Punkte'; if (timer) { const active = parts[state.sectionIndex] || parts[0]; timer.textContent = active.title + ': /' + active.points + ' — Gesamt: ' + getTotal() + '/75'; } } function renderTopTiles() { if (!topTiles) return; topTiles.innerHTML = ''; parts.forEach((part, index) => { const score = clampScore(part.id, state.scores[part.id]); const tile = document.createElement('div'); tile.className = 'tile' + (index === state.sectionIndex ? ' active' : '') + (score > 0 ? ' done' : ''); tile.innerHTML = `
${part.title} — ${part.subtitle}
${score}/${part.points} P
`; tile.onclick = () => showPart(index); topTiles.appendChild(tile); }); } function renderTabs() { tabs.forEach(tab => { tab.classList.toggle('active', tab.dataset.mundlichPart === state.activePart); tab.onclick = () => { const idx = parts.findIndex(part => part.id === tab.dataset.mundlichPart); if (idx >= 0) showPart(idx); }; }); } function loadFrameForPart(partId) { if (!frame || !placeholder) return; if (!MUNDLICH_EMBEDDED_HTML[partId]) { frame.style.display = 'none'; placeholder.style.display = 'block'; state.loadedPart = partId; setTimeout(resizeMundlichFrame, 100); return; } placeholder.style.display = 'none'; frame.style.display = 'block'; if (state.loadedPart !== partId) { frame.onload = () => { resizeMundlichFrame(); setTimeout(resizeMundlichFrame, 200); setTimeout(resizeMundlichFrame, 700); setTimeout(() => pullScoreFromActiveFrame(false), 300); setTimeout(() => pullScoreFromActiveFrame(false), 900); }; frame.srcdoc = partId === 't3' ? decodeEmbeddedHtml(MUNDLICH_EMBEDDED_HTML[partId]) : prepareMundlichHtml(MUNDLICH_EMBEDDED_HTML[partId]); state.loadedPart = partId; } else { setTimeout(resizeMundlichFrame, 50); setTimeout(() => pullScoreFromActiveFrame(false), 150); } } function showPart(index) { state.sectionIndex = index; const part = parts[index] || parts[0]; state.activePart = part.id; renderTopTiles(); renderTabs(); loadFrameForPart(part.id); updateTotal(); setTimeout(resizeMundlichFrame, 80); setTimeout(resizeMundlichFrame, 500); if (statusBox) statusBox.textContent = part.title + ' geöffnet. Punkte können manuell eingetragen oder aus dem Trainer übernommen werden.'; } function pullScoreFromActiveFrame(showMessage = true) { const part = parts[state.sectionIndex] || parts[0]; if (part.id === 't3') { if (showMessage && statusBox) statusBox.textContent = 'Teil 3 Datei ist geöffnet. Trage die Punkte manuell ein oder nutze die Teil-3-Aufgaben im Trainer.'; return false; } try { const doc = frame && frame.contentWindow && frame.contentWindow.document; const scoreNode = doc && (doc.getElementById('scoreNow') || doc.getElementById('finalScore') || doc.getElementById('scoreTotal')); let valueText = scoreNode ? scoreNode.textContent : ''; const fraction = String(valueText).match(/(\d+)\s*\/\s*(\d+)/); const single = String(valueText).match(/\d+/); const rawScore = fraction ? fraction[1] : (single ? single[0] : ''); if (rawScore === '') throw new Error('Score not found'); const nextScore = clampScore(part.id, rawScore); const changed = state.scores[part.id] !== nextScore; state.scores[part.id] = nextScore; syncInputs(); saveScores(false); if (showMessage && statusBox) statusBox.textContent = 'Punkte übernommen: ' + part.title + ' = ' + state.scores[part.id] + '/' + part.points + '.'; else if (changed && statusBox) statusBox.textContent = 'Auto-Punkte: ' + part.title + ' = ' + state.scores[part.id] + '/' + part.points + '.'; return true; } catch (error) { if (showMessage && statusBox) statusBox.textContent = 'Punkte konnten nicht automatisch gelesen werden. Trage sie manuell ein.'; return false; } } if (!window._mundlichListenersReady) { ['t1','t2','t3'].forEach(partId => { if (inputs[partId]) { inputs[partId].addEventListener('input', () => { state.scores[partId] = clampScore(partId, inputs[partId].value); saveScores(false); if (statusBox) statusBox.textContent = 'Punkte geändert: Mündlich ' + getTotal() + '/75.'; }); } }); const pullBtn = document.getElementById('pullMundlichScoreBtn'); const saveBtnSmall = document.getElementById('saveMundlichScoreBtn'); const openResultBtn = document.getElementById('openMundlichResultBtn'); const saveBtnTop = document.getElementById('saveBtn-mundlich'); const resultBtnTop = document.getElementById('resultBtn-mundlich'); const resetBtnTop = document.getElementById('resetBtn-mundlich'); const nextBtnTop = document.getElementById('nextBtn-mundlich'); if (fullScreenBtn) fullScreenBtn.addEventListener('click', toggleMundlichFullMode); document.addEventListener('fullscreenchange', () => { if (!document.fullscreenElement && document.body.classList.contains('mundlich-full-mode')) { setMundlichFullMode(false); } }); if (pullBtn) pullBtn.addEventListener('click', pullScoreFromActiveFrame); if (saveBtnSmall) saveBtnSmall.addEventListener('click', () => saveScores(true)); if (openResultBtn) openResultBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { saveScores(false); showPage('ergebnisse-page'); }); if (saveBtnTop) saveBtnTop.addEventListener('click', pullScoreFromActiveFrame); if (resultBtnTop) resultBtnTop.addEventListener('click', () => { saveScores(false); showPage('ergebnisse-page'); }); if (nextBtnTop) nextBtnTop.addEventListener('click', () => { saveScores(false); showPage('ergebnisse-page'); }); if (resetBtnTop) resetBtnTop.addEventListener('click', () => { if (confirm('Mündlich-Punkte wirklich zurücksetzen?')) { state.scores = { t1: 0, t2: 0, t3: 0 }; try { localStorage.setItem('mundlichScores', JSON.stringify(state.scores)); } catch (e) {} syncInputs(); updateTotal(); renderTopTiles(); if (statusBox) statusBox.textContent = 'Mündlich-Punkte zurückgesetzt.'; } }); window.addEventListener('resize', resizeMundlichFrame); window._mundlichListenersReady = true; } if (window._mundlichAutoScoreTimer) { clearInterval(window._mundlichAutoScoreTimer); } window._mundlichAutoScoreTimer = setInterval(() => { const page = document.getElementById('mundlich-page'); if (page && page.style.display !== 'none') { pullScoreFromActiveFrame(false); resizeMundlichFrame(); } }, 900); syncInputs(); showPart(state.sectionIndex || 0); setTimeout(() => pullScoreFromActiveFrame(false), 700); } // ===== LESEN PAGE FUNCTIONALITY ===== function initLesenPage() { const exam = EXAM_DATA.lesen; // Global variables for click selection mode window.selectedHeadingId = null; window.selectedSituationId = null; window.selectedWordId = null; window.selectedWord = null; /* ===== State & DOM refs ===== */ let state = { sectionIndex: 0, questionIndex: 0, answers: {}, marked: {}, remaining: exam.durationSec, showResults: false, timerStarted: false, timerInterval: null, examEnded: false, currentPage: 'lesen' }; const topTiles = document.getElementById('topTiles-lesen'); const passageTitleEl = document.getElementById('passageTitle-lesen'); const passageContentEl = document.getElementById('passageContent-lesen'); const sectionNameEl = document.getElementById('sectionName-lesen'); const questionTitleEl = document.getElementById('questionTitle-lesen'); const questionBodyEl = document.getElementById('questionBody-lesen'); const headingsBankContainer = document.getElementById('headingsBankContainer-lesen'); const timerEl = document.getElementById('timer-lesen'); const statusText = document.getElementById('statusText-lesen'); const resultBtn = document.getElementById('resultBtn-lesen'); const resetBtn = document.getElementById('resetBtn-lesen'); const resetSectionBtn = document.getElementById('resetSectionBtn-lesen'); /* ===== Timer Functions with Auto-Submit ===== */ function handleTimeExpired() { if (state.examEnded) return; state.examEnded = true; if (state.timerInterval) { clearInterval(state.timerInterval); state.timerInterval = null; } state.showResults = true; renderAll(); setTimeout(() => { if (state.sectionIndex < exam.sections.length - 1) { state.sectionIndex++; state.showResults = false; state.examEnded = false; renderAll(); } else { showPage('hoeren-page'); } }, 2000); } function startTimer(){ if(state.timerInterval) { clearInterval(state.timerInterval); } state.timerStarted = true; state.timerInterval = setInterval(()=>{ if(state.remaining <= 0){ clearInterval(state.timerInterval); timerEl.textContent = 'Zeit abgelaufen'; handleTimeExpired(); return; } state.remaining--; updateTimerDisplay(); }, 1000); } function resetTimer(){ if(state.timerInterval) { clearInterval(state.timerInterval); } state.remaining = exam.durationSec; state.timerStarted = false; state.examEnded = false; updateTimerDisplay(); startTimer(); } function updateTimerDisplay(){ const min = Math.floor(state.remaining / 60); const sec = state.remaining % 60; timerEl.textContent = `Verbleibende Zeit: ${min.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${sec.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`; } /* ===== Reset Section Function ===== */ function resetCurrentSection() { const currentSection = exam.sections[state.sectionIndex]; if (confirm(`Möchten Sie wirklich den Teil "${currentSection.title}" zurücksetzen? Alle Antworten in diesem Teil werden gelöscht.`)) { if (currentSection.id === 's1') { currentSection.texts.forEach(text => { delete state.answers[text.id]; }); } else if (currentSection.id === 's2') { currentSection.questions.forEach(question => { delete state.answers[question.id]; }); } else if (currentSection.id === 's3') { currentSection.situations.forEach(situation => { delete state.answers[situation.id]; }); } else if (currentSection.id === 's4') { currentSection.fillBlanks.forEach(blank => { delete state.answers[blank.id]; }); } else if (currentSection.id === 's5') { currentSection.fillBlanks2.forEach(blank => { delete state.answers[blank.id]; }); } renderAll(); } } /* ===== Render ===== */ function renderTopTiles(){ topTiles.innerHTML=''; exam.sections.forEach((sec,idx)=>{ const div=document.createElement('div'); div.className='tile'+(idx===state.sectionIndex?' active':'')+(isSectionDone(sec)?' done':''); div.innerHTML=`
${sec.title}
${sec.points} P
`; div.onclick=()=>{state.sectionIndex=idx; state.questionIndex=0; state.showResults=false; renderAll();}; topTiles.appendChild(div); }); } function isSectionDone(section){ if(section.id==='s1') return section.texts.every(t=>state.answers[t.id]); if(section.id==='s2') return section.questions.every(q=>state.answers[q.id]); if(section.id==='s3') return section.situations.every(h=>state.answers[h.id] || state.answers[h.id] === 'X'); if(section.id==='s4') return section.fillBlanks.every(b=>state.answers[b.id]); if(section.id==='s5') return section.fillBlanks2.every(b=>state.answers[b.id]); return false; } function renderAll(){ if (state.examEnded) return; renderTopTiles(); const section = exam.sections[state.sectionIndex]; sectionNameEl.textContent = section.title; passageTitleEl.textContent = section.passageTitle; resetSectionBtn.style.display = 'block'; if(state.showResults){ renderResults(); return; } if(section.id === 's1'){ renderPart1(); } else if(section.id === 's2'){ renderPart2(); } else if(section.id === 's3'){ renderPart3(); } else if(section.id === 's4'){ renderSprachbausteine1(); } else if(section.id === 's5'){ renderSprachbausteine2(); } } function renderPart1(){ const section = exam.sections[state.sectionIndex]; let textsHTML = `
Ziehen Sie die passenden Überschriften auf die Texte. Sie können jede Überschrift nur einmal verwenden. (Klicken: Titel auswählen → auf Text klicken)
`; section.texts.forEach((text, idx) => { const letter = String.fromCharCode(97 + idx); const selectedHeading = state.answers[text.id]; textsHTML += `
Text ${letter.toUpperCase()}
${text.content}
${selectedHeading ? getHeadingTextById(selectedHeading) : 'Ziehen Sie hier eine Überschrift hin'}
`; }); passageContentEl.innerHTML = textsHTML; let headingsHTML = `
`; section.headings.forEach(heading => { const isUsed = section.texts.some(text => state.answers[text.id] === heading.id); headingsHTML += `
${heading.id}) ${heading.text}
`; }); headingsHTML += `
`; headingsBankContainer.innerHTML = headingsHTML; setupDragAndDrop(); questionBodyEl.innerHTML = ''; questionTitleEl.textContent = ''; } function handleHeadingClick(headingId) { const section = exam.sections[state.sectionIndex]; const isUsed = section.texts.some(text => state.answers[text.id] === headingId); if (isUsed) return; if (window.selectedHeadingId === headingId) { window.selectedHeadingId = null; } else { window.selectedHeadingId = headingId; } renderPart1(); } function handleSlotClick(textId) { if (window.selectedHeadingId) { Object.keys(state.answers).forEach(key => { if (state.answers[key] === window.selectedHeadingId) { delete state.answers[key]; } }); state.answers[textId] = window.selectedHeadingId; window.selectedHeadingId = null; renderAll(); } else if (state.answers[textId]) { delete state.answers[textId]; renderAll(); } } function getHeadingTextById(id){ const section = exam.sections[state.sectionIndex]; const heading = section.headings.find(h => h.id === id); return heading ? `${heading.id}) ${heading.text}` : ''; } function setupDragAndDrop(){ const headingItems = document.querySelectorAll('.heading-item:not(.used)'); const titleSlots = document.querySelectorAll('.title-slot'); headingItems.forEach(item => { item.addEventListener('dragstart', (e) => { e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', e.target.dataset.headingId); }); }); titleSlots.forEach(slot => { slot.addEventListener('dragover', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); slot.style.background = '#e8f4ff'; }); slot.addEventListener('dragleave', (e) => { slot.style.background = slot.classList.contains('has-title') ? '#e8fbe9' : '#f8fbff'; }); slot.addEventListener('drop', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); const headingId = e.dataTransfer.getData('text/plain'); const textId = slot.dataset.textId; Object.keys(state.answers).forEach(key => { if(state.answers[key] === headingId) { delete state.answers[key]; } }); state.answers[textId] = headingId; window.selectedHeadingId = null; renderAll(); }); }); } function renderPart2(){ const section = exam.sections[state.sectionIndex]; passageContentEl.innerHTML = `
${section.passage}
`; let questionsHTML = `
`; section.questions.forEach((question, idx) => { const questionNumber = idx + 1; const userAnswer = state.answers[question.id]; const correctOption = question.options.find(o => o.id === question.correctAnswer); const isCorrect = userAnswer === question.correctAnswer; questionsHTML += `
${questionNumber}. ${question.text}
${question.options.map(opt => { const isSelected = userAnswer === opt.id; const isCorrectOpt = opt.id === question.correctAnswer; let optionClass = 'option'; if (isSelected) optionClass += ' selected'; if (state.showResults) { if (isCorrectOpt) optionClass += ' correct-answer'; else if (isSelected && !isCorrect) optionClass += ' incorrect-answer'; } return `
${opt.text}
`; }).join('')}
${userAnswer && state.showResults ? `
Ihre Antwort: ${userAnswer ? (question.options.find(o => o.id === userAnswer)?.text || userAnswer) : '-'}
Richtige Antwort: ${correctOption ? correctOption.text : '-'}
Ergebnis: ${isCorrect ? '✔️ Antwort richtig' : '❌ Antwort falsch'}
` : ''}
`; }); questionsHTML += `
`; questionBodyEl.innerHTML = questionsHTML; questionTitleEl.textContent = ''; headingsBankContainer.innerHTML = ''; } function renderPart3(){ const section = exam.sections[state.sectionIndex]; let textsHTML = `
Ziehen Sie die passenden Situationen auf die Texte. Sie können jede Situation nur einmal verwenden. Manchmal passt keine Situation. (Klicken: Situation auswählen → auf Text klicken)

Texte (A-L)

`; section.texts.forEach(text => { const userAnswer = Object.keys(state.answers).find(key => state.answers[key] === text.id); const selectedSituation = userAnswer ? section.situations.find(h => h.id === userAnswer) : null; textsHTML += `
${text.id})
${text.text}
${selectedSituation ? selectedSituation.text : (userAnswer === 'X' ? 'X - Keine passende Situation' : 'Ziehen Sie hier eine Situation hin')}
`; }); textsHTML += `
`; passageContentEl.innerHTML = textsHTML; let situationsHTML = `

Situationen (11-20)

`; section.situations.forEach((situation, idx) => { const situationNumber = parseInt(situation.id); const isUsed = state.answers[situation.id]; const isX = state.answers[situation.id] === 'X'; situationsHTML += `
${situationNumber}.
${situation.text}
${!isUsed ? `` : ''} ${isUsed && isX ? `` : ''}
`; }); situationsHTML += `
`; questionBodyEl.innerHTML = situationsHTML; questionTitleEl.textContent = ''; headingsBankContainer.innerHTML = ''; setupPart3DragAndDrop(); } function handleSituationClick(situationId) { if (window.selectedSituationId === situationId) { window.selectedSituationId = null; } else { window.selectedSituationId = situationId; } renderPart3(); } function handleSituationSlotClick(textId) { if (window.selectedSituationId) { Object.keys(state.answers).forEach(key => { if (state.answers[key] === window.selectedSituationId) { delete state.answers[key]; } }); state.answers[window.selectedSituationId] = textId; window.selectedSituationId = null; renderAll(); } else { const situationId = Object.keys(state.answers).find(key => state.answers[key] === textId); if (situationId) { delete state.answers[situationId]; renderAll(); } } } function markNoMatch(situationId) { Object.keys(state.answers).forEach(key => { if(state.answers[key] === situationId) { delete state.answers[key]; } }); state.answers[situationId] = 'X'; window.selectedSituationId = null; renderAll(); } function restoreSituation(situationId) { delete state.answers[situationId]; renderAll(); } function setupPart3DragAndDrop(){ const situationItems = document.querySelectorAll('.situation-item:not(.used)'); const textSlots = document.querySelectorAll('.text-item .title-slot'); situationItems.forEach(item => { item.addEventListener('dragstart', (e) => { e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', e.target.dataset.situationId); }); }); textSlots.forEach(slot => { slot.addEventListener('dragover', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); slot.style.background = '#e8f4ff'; }); slot.addEventListener('dragleave', (e) => { const hasTitle = slot.classList.contains('has-title'); const hasX = slot.classList.contains('has-x'); slot.style.background = hasTitle ? '#e8fbe9' : (hasX ? '#f8d7da' : '#f8fbff'); }); slot.addEventListener('drop', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); const situationId = e.dataTransfer.getData('text/plain'); const textId = slot.dataset.textId; Object.keys(state.answers).forEach(key => { if(state.answers[key] === situationId) { delete state.answers[key]; } }); state.answers[situationId] = textId; window.selectedSituationId = null; renderAll(); }); }); } function renderSprachbausteine1(){ const section = exam.sections[state.sectionIndex]; let textWithBlanks = section.fillText; const blankPlaceholders = []; section.fillBlanks.forEach(blank => { blankPlaceholders.push(`BLANK_${blank.id}`); }); let tempText = textWithBlanks; blankPlaceholders.forEach((placeholder, index) => { tempText = tempText.replace('________', placeholder); }); section.fillBlanks.forEach(blank => { const userAnswer = state.answers[blank.id]; const displayText = userAnswer ? userAnswer : '________'; tempText = tempText.replace(`BLANK_${blank.id}`, `${displayText}`); }); passageContentEl.innerHTML = `
Klicken Sie auf jede Lücke und wählen Sie das passende Wort aus. Sie können die Lücken in beliebiger Reihenfolge ausfüllen.
${tempText}
`; let optionsHTML = `
`; section.fillBlanks.forEach(blank => { const userAnswer = state.answers[blank.id]; optionsHTML += `
${blank.id}
${blank.options.map(opt => { const isCorrect = opt === blank.correctAnswer; const isSelected = userAnswer === opt; let btnClass = 'option-btn'; if (isSelected) btnClass += ' selected'; if (state.showResults && isCorrect) btnClass += ' correct-answer'; return `
${opt}
`; }).join('')}
${userAnswer && state.showResults ? `
${userAnswer === blank.correctAnswer ? '✔️' : '❌'}
` : ''}
`; }); optionsHTML += `
`; questionBodyEl.innerHTML = optionsHTML; questionTitleEl.textContent = ''; headingsBankContainer.innerHTML = ''; } function handleBlankClick(blankId) { const section = exam.sections[state.sectionIndex]; const blank = section.fillBlanks.find(b => b.id === blankId); if (!blank) return; const popup = document.createElement('div'); popup.className = 'options-popup'; blank.options.forEach(opt => { const optionItem = document.createElement('div'); optionItem.className = 'option-item'; optionItem.textContent = opt; optionItem.onclick = () => { selectSprachbausteine1(blankId, opt); document.querySelectorAll('.options-popup').forEach(p => p.remove()); }; popup.appendChild(optionItem); }); document.querySelectorAll('.options-popup').forEach(p => p.remove()); const element = document.querySelector(`[data-blank-id="${blankId}"]`); if (element) { element.appendChild(popup); } } function selectSprachbausteine1(blankId, answer){ state.answers[blankId] = answer; renderAll(); } function renderSprachbausteine2(){ const section = exam.sections[state.sectionIndex]; let textWithPlaceholders = section.fillText2; const placeholders = []; section.fillBlanks2.forEach(blank => { const ph = `BLANK_${blank.id}`; placeholders.push({id: blank.id, ph}); textWithPlaceholders = textWithPlaceholders.replace('________', ph); }); placeholders.forEach(item => { const userAnswer = state.answers[item.id]; const displayText = userAnswer ? userAnswer : '________'; const span = `${displayText}`; textWithPlaceholders = textWithPlaceholders.replace(item.ph, span); }); passageContentEl.innerHTML = `
Klicken Sie auf eine Lücke und dann auf ein Wort aus der Liste. (Klicken: Wort auswählen → auf Lücke klicken)
${textWithPlaceholders}
`; let wordBankHTML = `
`; const usedWords = Object.values(state.answers); const bank = section.fillBlanks2[0] ? section.fillBlanks2[0].options : []; bank.forEach(word => { const isUsed = usedWords.includes(word); const isSelected = window.selectedWord === word; wordBankHTML += `
${word}
`; }); wordBankHTML += `
`; questionBodyEl.innerHTML = wordBankHTML; questionTitleEl.textContent = ''; headingsBankContainer.innerHTML = ''; setupSprachbausteine2DragAndDrop(); } function handleWordClick(word) { if (window.selectedWord === word) { window.selectedWord = null; window.selectedWordId = null; } else { window.selectedWord = word; window.selectedWordId = null; } renderSprachbausteine2(); } function handleWordSlotClick(blankId) { if (window.selectedWord) { const word = window.selectedWord; Object.keys(state.answers).forEach(key => { if (state.answers[key] === word) { delete state.answers[key]; } }); state.answers[blankId] = word; window.selectedWord = null; renderSprachbausteine2(); } else if (state.answers[blankId]) { delete state.answers[blankId]; renderSprachbausteine2(); } } function setupSprachbausteine2DragAndDrop(){ const wordItems = document.querySelectorAll('.bank-word-vertical:not(.used)'); const blankSlots = document.querySelectorAll('.blank-slot'); wordItems.forEach(item => { item.addEventListener('dragstart', (e) => { e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', e.target.dataset.word); }); }); blankSlots.forEach(slot => { slot.addEventListener('dragover', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); slot.style.background = '#e8f4ff'; }); slot.addEventListener('dragleave', (e) => { slot.style.background = slot.classList.contains('has-answer') ? '#e8fbe9' : '#f8fbff'; }); slot.addEventListener('drop', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); const word = e.dataTransfer.getData('text/plain'); const blankId = slot.dataset.blankId; selectSprachbausteine2(blankId, word); }); }); } function selectSprachbausteine2(blankId, word){ Object.keys(state.answers).forEach(key => { if (state.answers[key] === word) { delete state.answers[key]; } }); state.answers[blankId] = word; window.selectedWord = null; renderSprachbausteine2(); } function selectOption(questionId, optionId){ state.answers[questionId] = optionId; renderAll(); } function renderResults() { const section = exam.sections[state.sectionIndex]; let resultsHTML = `

${section.title} - Ergebnisse

`; let totalCorrect = 0; let totalQuestions = 0; if (section.id === 's1') { section.texts.forEach((text, index) => { totalQuestions++; const userAnswer = state.answers[text.id]; const isCorrect = userAnswer === text.correctAnswer; if (isCorrect) totalCorrect++; const resultClass = isCorrect ? 'correct' : 'incorrect'; const resultIcon = isCorrect ? '✓' : '✗'; const answerText = userAnswer ? getHeadingTextById(userAnswer) : 'Nicht beantwortet'; const correctHeading = section.headings.find(h => h.id === text.correctAnswer); const correctText = correctHeading ? `${correctHeading.id}) ${correctHeading.text}` : '-'; resultsHTML += `
Text ${String.fromCharCode(97 + index).toUpperCase()}
Ihre Antwort: ${answerText}
Richtig: ${correctText}
${resultIcon}
`; }); } else if (section.id === 's2') { section.questions.forEach((question, index) => { totalQuestions++; const userAnswer = state.answers[question.id]; const isCorrect = userAnswer === question.correctAnswer; if (isCorrect) totalCorrect++; const resultClass = isCorrect ? 'correct' : 'incorrect'; const resultIcon = isCorrect ? '✓' : '✗'; let userAnswerText = 'Nicht beantwortet'; if (userAnswer) { const option = question.options.find(o => o.id === userAnswer); userAnswerText = option ? option.text : userAnswer; } const correctOption = question.options.find(o => o.id === question.correctAnswer); const correctText = correctOption ? correctOption.text : '-'; resultsHTML += `
${index + 1}. ${question.text.substring(0, 50)}...
Ihre Antwort: ${userAnswerText}
Richtig: ${correctText}
${resultIcon}
`; }); } else if (section.id === 's3') { section.situations.forEach((situation, index) => { totalQuestions++; const userAnswer = state.answers[situation.id]; const correctText = section.texts.find(t => t.correctAnswer === situation.id); const isCorrect = userAnswer === (correctText ? correctText.id : null); if (isCorrect) totalCorrect++; const resultClass = isCorrect ? 'correct' : 'incorrect'; const resultIcon = isCorrect ? '✓' : '✗'; let userDisplay = userAnswer || '-'; let correctDisplay = correctText ? correctText.id : 'X'; if (userAnswer === 'X') userDisplay = 'X - Kein passender Text'; if (correctText) correctDisplay = `${correctText.id} - ${correctText.text.substring(0, 30)}...`; else correctDisplay = 'X - Kein passender Text'; resultsHTML += `
Situation ${situation.id}
Ihre Antwort: ${userDisplay}
Richtig: ${correctDisplay}
${resultIcon}
`; }); } else if (section.id === 's4') { section.fillBlanks.forEach(blank => { totalQuestions++; const userAnswer = state.answers[blank.id]; const isCorrect = userAnswer === blank.correctAnswer; if (isCorrect) totalCorrect++; const resultClass = isCorrect ? 'correct' : 'incorrect'; const resultIcon = isCorrect ? '✓' : '✗'; resultsHTML += `
Lücke ${blank.id}
Ihre Antwort: ${userAnswer || '-'}
Richtig: ${blank.correctAnswer}
${resultIcon}
`; }); } else if (section.id === 's5') { section.fillBlanks2.forEach(blank => { totalQuestions++; const userAnswer = state.answers[blank.id]; const isCorrect = userAnswer === blank.correctAnswer; if (isCorrect) totalCorrect++; const resultClass = isCorrect ? 'correct' : 'incorrect'; const resultIcon = isCorrect ? '✓' : '✗'; resultsHTML += `
Lücke ${blank.id}
Ihre Antwort: ${userAnswer || '-'}
Richtig: ${blank.correctAnswer}
${resultIcon}
`; }); } const percentage = totalQuestions > 0 ? Math.round((totalCorrect / totalQuestions) * 100) : 0; resultsHTML += `
${percentage}%
${totalCorrect} von ${totalQuestions} richtig
Punkte: ${Math.round((totalCorrect / totalQuestions) * section.points)} / ${section.points}
`; passageContentEl.innerHTML = resultsHTML; questionBodyEl.innerHTML = ''; sectionNameEl.textContent = 'Ergebnisse'; questionTitleEl.textContent = ''; } /* ===== Event Listeners ===== */ document.getElementById('prevBtn-lesen').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ if(state.sectionIndex > 0){ state.sectionIndex--; state.questionIndex = 0; renderAll(); } }); document.getElementById('nextBtn2-lesen').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ if(state.sectionIndex < exam.sections.length - 1){ state.sectionIndex++; state.questionIndex = 0; renderAll(); } else { showPage('hoeren-page'); } }); document.getElementById('nextBtn-lesen').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ showPage('hoeren-page'); }); resultBtn.addEventListener('click', ()=>{ state.showResults = !state.showResults; renderAll(); }); resetBtn.addEventListener('click', ()=>{ if(confirm('Möchten Sie wirklich von neu beginnen? Alle Antworten werden gelöscht.')){ state.answers = {}; state.marked = {}; state.showResults = false; resetTimer(); renderAll(); } }); resetSectionBtn.addEventListener('click', resetCurrentSection); document.getElementById('saveBtn-lesen').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ statusText.textContent = 'Gespeichert'; setTimeout(()=>{statusText.textContent = 'Nicht gespeichert'}, 2000); }); document.getElementById('submitBtn-lesen').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ if(confirm('Möchten Sie die Prüfung wirklich abgeben?')){ state.showResults = true; renderAll(); } }); /* ===== Initialize ===== */ updateTimerDisplay(); renderAll(); startTimer(); window._lesenState = state; window.lesenApp = { selectOption, markNoMatch, restoreSituation, selectSprachbausteine1, selectSprachbausteine2, handleHeadingClick, handleSlotClick, handleSituationClick, handleSituationSlotClick, handleBlankClick, handleWordClick, handleWordSlotClick }; } // ===== HÖREN PAGE FUNCTIONALITY ===== function initHoerenPage() { const exam = EXAM_DATA.hoeren; let state = { sectionIndex: 0, answers: {}, remaining: exam.durationSec, showResults: false, timerStarted: false, timerInterval: null, examEnded: false, currentPage: 'hoeren' }; const topTiles = document.getElementById('topTiles-hoeren'); const contentContainer = document.getElementById('contentContainer-hoeren'); const timerEl = document.getElementById('timer-hoeren'); const statusText = document.getElementById('statusText-hoeren'); function handleTimeExpired() { if (state.examEnded) return; state.examEnded = true; if (state.timerInterval) { clearInterval(state.timerInterval); state.timerInterval = null; } state.showResults = true; renderAll(); setTimeout(() => { if (state.sectionIndex < exam.sections.length - 1) { state.sectionIndex++; state.showResults = false; state.examEnded = false; renderAll(); } else { showPage('schreiben-page'); } }, 2000); } function startTimer() { if (state.timerInterval) { clearInterval(state.timerInterval); } state.timerStarted = true; state.timerInterval = setInterval(() => { if (state.remaining <= 0) { clearInterval(state.timerInterval); timerEl.textContent = 'Zeit abgelaufen'; handleTimeExpired(); return; } state.remaining--; updateTimerDisplay(); }, 1000); } function resetTimer() { if (state.timerInterval) { clearInterval(state.timerInterval); } state.remaining = exam.durationSec; state.timerStarted = false; state.examEnded = false; updateTimerDisplay(); startTimer(); } function updateTimerDisplay() { const min = Math.floor(state.remaining / 60); const sec = state.remaining % 60; timerEl.textContent = `Verbleibende Zeit: ${min.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${sec.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`; } function renderTopTiles() { topTiles.innerHTML = ''; exam.sections.forEach((sec, idx) => { const div = document.createElement('div'); div.className = 'tile' + (idx === state.sectionIndex ? ' active' : '') + (isSectionDone(sec) ? ' done' : ''); div.innerHTML = `
${sec.title}
${sec.points} P
`; div.onclick = () => { state.sectionIndex = idx; state.showResults = false; renderAll(); }; topTiles.appendChild(div); }); } function isSectionDone(section) { const answers = state.answers[section.id]; if (!answers) return false; const answeredQuestions = Object.keys(answers).length; const totalQuestions = section.questions.length; return answeredQuestions === totalQuestions; } function renderAll() { if (state.examEnded) return; renderTopTiles(); if (state.showResults) { renderResults(); return; } renderListeningSection(); } function renderListeningSection() { const section = exam.sections[state.sectionIndex]; const currentAnswers = state.answers[section.id] || {}; let contentHTML = `
${section.title}
Sie hören die Nachrichten. Entscheiden Sie beim Hören, ob die Aussagen richtig oder falsch sind. Sie hören die Nachrichten nur einmal. Sie haben jetzt 30 Sekunden, um die Aussagen zu lesen.
`; section.questions.forEach((question, index) => { const currentAnswer = currentAnswers[question.id] || ''; contentHTML += ` `; }); contentHTML += `
Nr. Aussage Ihre Antwort
${question.id} ${question.text}
`; contentContainer.innerHTML = contentHTML; } function updateListeningAnswer(sectionId, questionId, answer) { if (!state.answers[sectionId]) { state.answers[sectionId] = {}; } state.answers[sectionId][questionId] = answer; renderTopTiles(); } function renderResults() { const section = exam.sections[state.sectionIndex]; const userAnswers = state.answers[section.id] || {}; let correctCount = 0; let resultsHTML = `
Ergebnisse - ${section.title}
`; section.questions.forEach((question) => { const userAnswer = userAnswers[question.id] || '-'; const correctAnswer = section.correctAnswers[question.id]; const gotCorrect = userAnswer === correctAnswer; const points = gotCorrect ? "1" : "0"; if (gotCorrect) correctCount++; const rowClass = gotCorrect ? 'correct-answer' : 'incorrect-answer'; resultsHTML += ` `; }); const totalPoints = Math.round((correctCount / section.questions.length) * section.points); resultsHTML += `
Nr. Aussage Ihre Antwort Richtige Antwort Punkte
${question.id} ${question.text} ${userAnswer} ${correctAnswer} ${points}
Erreichte Punkte: ${correctCount}/${section.questions.length} richtig = ${totalPoints}/${section.points} Punkten
`; contentContainer.innerHTML = resultsHTML; } document.getElementById('prevBtn-hoeren').addEventListener('click', () => { if (state.sectionIndex > 0) { state.sectionIndex--; state.showResults = false; renderAll(); } }); document.getElementById('nextBtn2-hoeren').addEventListener('click', () => { if (state.sectionIndex < exam.sections.length - 1) { state.sectionIndex++; state.showResults = false; renderAll(); } else { showPage('schreiben-page'); } }); document.getElementById('nextBtn-hoeren').addEventListener('click', () => { showPage('schreiben-page'); }); document.getElementById('resultBtn-hoeren').addEventListener('click', () => { state.showResults = !state.showResults; renderAll(); }); document.getElementById('resetBtn-hoeren').addEventListener('click', () => { if (confirm('Möchten Sie wirklich von neu beginnen? Alle Antworten werden gelöscht.')) { state.answers = {}; state.showResults = false; resetTimer(); renderAll(); } }); document.getElementById('saveBtn-hoeren').addEventListener('click', () => { statusText.textContent = 'Gespeichert'; setTimeout(() => { statusText.textContent = 'Nicht gespeichert' }, 2000); }); document.getElementById('submitBtn-hoeren').addEventListener('click', () => { if (confirm('Möchten Sie die Prüfung wirklich abgeben?')) { state.showResults = true; renderAll(); } }); updateTimerDisplay(); renderAll(); startTimer(); window._hoerenState = state; window.hoerenApp = { updateListeningAnswer }; } function escapeHtml(value) { return String(value ?? '') .replace(/&/g, '&') .replace(//g, '>') .replace(/"/g, '"') .replace(/'/g, '''); } // ===== SCHREIBEN PAGE FUNCTIONALITY ===== function initSchreibenPage() { const exam = EXAM_DATA.schreiben; let state = { sectionIndex: 0, answers: {}, remaining: exam.durationSec, showResults: false, timerStarted: false, timerInterval: null, examEnded: false, currentPage: 'schreiben' }; const topTiles = document.getElementById('topTiles-schreiben'); const passageTitleEl = document.getElementById('passageTitle-schreiben'); const passageContentEl = document.getElementById('passageContent-schreiben'); const writingContainer = document.getElementById('writingContainer-schreiben'); const timerEl = document.getElementById('timer-schreiben'); const statusText = document.getElementById('statusText-schreiben'); function handleTimeExpired() { if (state.examEnded) return; state.examEnded = true; if (state.timerInterval) { clearInterval(state.timerInterval); state.timerInterval = null; } state.showResults = true; renderAll(); setTimeout(() => { showPage('ergebnisse-page'); }, 2000); } function startTimer() { if (state.timerInterval) { clearInterval(state.timerInterval); } state.timerStarted = true; state.timerInterval = setInterval(() => { if (state.remaining <= 0) { clearInterval(state.timerInterval); timerEl.textContent = 'Zeit abgelaufen'; handleTimeExpired(); return; } state.remaining--; updateTimerDisplay(); }, 1000); } function resetTimer() { if (state.timerInterval) { clearInterval(state.timerInterval); } state.remaining = exam.durationSec; state.timerStarted = false; state.examEnded = false; updateTimerDisplay(); startTimer(); } function updateTimerDisplay() { const min = Math.floor(state.remaining / 60); const sec = state.remaining % 60; timerEl.textContent = `Verbleibende Zeit: ${min.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${sec.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`; } function renderTopTiles() { topTiles.innerHTML = ''; exam.sections.forEach((sec, idx) => { const div = document.createElement('div'); div.className = 'tile' + (idx === state.sectionIndex ? ' active' : '') + (isSectionDone(sec) ? ' done' : ''); div.innerHTML = `
${sec.title}
${sec.points} P
`; div.onclick = () => { state.sectionIndex = idx; state.showResults = false; renderAll(); }; topTiles.appendChild(div); }); } function isSectionDone(section) { return state.answers[section.id] && state.answers[section.id].length > 0; } function renderAll() { if (state.examEnded) return; renderTopTiles(); const section = exam.sections[state.sectionIndex]; passageTitleEl.textContent = section.passageTitle; if (state.showResults) { renderResults(); return; } renderWritingSection(); } function renderWritingSection() { const section = exam.sections[state.sectionIndex]; passageContentEl.innerHTML = `
${section.writingTask.prompt}

Schreiben Sie in Ihrer E-Mail:

    ${section.writingTask.requirements.map(req => `
  • ${req}
    • `).join('')}
`; const currentAnswer = state.answers[section.id] || ''; const wordCount = countWords(currentAnswer); writingContainer.innerHTML = `
Wörter: ${wordCount}
`; } function countWords(text) { return text.trim() === '' ? 0 : text.trim().split(/\s+/).length; } function updateWritingAnswer(sectionId, text) { state.answers[sectionId] = text; localStorage.setItem(`schreibenAnswer_${sectionId}`, text); localStorage.removeItem('schreibenPoints'); localStorage.removeItem('schreibenPointsManual'); const wordCount = countWords(text); const counter = document.querySelector('.word-counter .count'); if (counter) counter.textContent = wordCount; } function renderResults() { const section = exam.sections[state.sectionIndex]; const userAnswer = state.answers[section.id] || ''; const wordCount = countWords(userAnswer); const auto = typeof autoEvaluateSchreiben === 'function' ? autoEvaluateSchreiben(userAnswer, section) : { points: 0, maxPoints: section.points, feedback: ['Automatische Bewertung nicht verfügbar.'], breakdown: [] }; let resultsHTML = `

${section.title} - Automatische Ergebnisse

Ihre Antwort (${wordCount} Wörter):

${escapeHtml(userAnswer || 'Keine Antwort')}
${auto.points}/${auto.maxPoints} Punkte
Automatische Bewertung

Feedback:

    ${auto.feedback.map(f => `
  • ${escapeHtml(f)}
    • `).join('')}
`; passageContentEl.innerHTML = resultsHTML; writingContainer.innerHTML = ''; } document.getElementById('prevBtn-schreiben').addEventListener('click', () => { if (state.sectionIndex > 0) { state.sectionIndex--; state.showResults = false; renderAll(); } }); document.getElementById('nextBtn2-schreiben').addEventListener('click', () => { if (state.sectionIndex < exam.sections.length - 1) { state.sectionIndex++; state.showResults = false; renderAll(); } else { showPage('mundlich-page'); } }); document.getElementById('nextBtn-schreiben').addEventListener('click', () => { showPage('mundlich-page'); }); document.getElementById('resultBtn-schreiben').addEventListener('click', () => { state.showResults = !state.showResults; renderAll(); }); document.getElementById('resetBtn-schreiben').addEventListener('click', () => { if (confirm('Möchten Sie wirklich von neu beginnen? Alle Antworten werden gelöscht.')) { state.answers = {}; state.showResults = false; resetTimer(); renderAll(); } }); document.getElementById('saveBtn-schreiben').addEventListener('click', () => { statusText.textContent = 'Gespeichert'; setTimeout(() => { statusText.textContent = 'Nicht gespeichert' }, 2000); }); document.getElementById('submitBtn-schreiben').addEventListener('click', () => { if (confirm('Möchten Sie Schreiben abgeben und mit Mündlich weitermachen?')) { state.showResults = true; renderAll(); showPage('mundlich-page'); } }); updateTimerDisplay(); renderAll(); startTimer(); window._schreibenState = state; window.schreibenApp = { updateWritingAnswer }; } // ===== AUTOMATISCHE SCHREIBEN-BEWERTUNG ===== function autoEvaluateSchreiben(answer, section) { const maxPoints = section && section.points ? section.points : 45; const text = String(answer || '').trim(); const lower = text.toLowerCase(); const words = text ? text.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean) : []; const wordCount = words.length; const sentences = text.split(/[.!?]+/).map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean); const feedback = []; const breakdown = []; function add(label, score, max, note) { score = Math.max(0, Math.min(max, Math.round(score))); breakdown.push({ label, score, max, note }); if (note) feedback.push(note); return score; } function hasAny(patterns) { return patterns.some(pattern => pattern.test(lower)); } let points = 0; let lengthScore = 0; if (wordCount >= 80 && wordCount <= 150) lengthScore = 10; else if (wordCount >= 60 && wordCount < 80) lengthScore = 8; else if (wordCount > 150 && wordCount <= 190) lengthScore = 8; else if (wordCount >= 40 && wordCount < 60) lengthScore = 5; else if (wordCount > 190) lengthScore = 6; else if (wordCount > 0) lengthScore = 2; points += add('Umfang', lengthScore, 10, wordCount >= 80 && wordCount <= 150 ? `Guter Umfang: ${wordCount} Wörter.` : `Umfang verbessern: ${wordCount} Wörter. Ideal sind ungefähr 80–150 Wörter.`); const requirements = section && section.writingTask && Array.isArray(section.writingTask.requirements) ? section.writingTask.requirements.map(r => String(r || '').trim()).filter(Boolean) : []; const stopWords = ['und','oder','aber','dass','eine','einen','einer','einem','eines','der','die','das','dem','den','des','wie','was','wenn','sich','sie','ihre','ihr','ihnen','bei','mit','für','von','nach','über','aus','zum','zur','als','auch','nicht','haben','sein','sind','wurde','werden','kann','können']; function keywordHit(requirement) { const req = requirement.toLowerCase(); const keywords = req .replace(/[^a-zäöüß\s-]/gi, ' ') .split(/\s+/) .map(w => w.trim()) .filter(w => w.length >= 5 && !stopWords.includes(w)); let hits = 0; keywords.forEach(word => { const simple = word.replace(/(en|er|es|e|n|s)$/i, ''); if (simple.length >= 4 && lower.includes(simple)) hits++; }); const semanticPatterns = []; if (/neu|neuigkeit|geändert|passiert/.test(req)) semanticPatterns.push(/\b(neu|neues|neuigkeit|geändert|passiert|bei mir|ich habe|ich bin)\b/); if (/urlaub|ferien|reise/.test(req)) semanticPatterns.push(/\b(urlaub|ferien|reise|zurück|gereist|erholt|büro|arbeit)\b/); if (/arbeit|arbeite|kollegen|alleine|allein|büro/.test(req)) semanticPatterns.push(/\b(arbeit|arbeite|büro|kollege|kollegen|allein|alleine|zusammen|team)\b/); if (/vorschlag|tipp|helfen|ratschlag|empfehl/.test(req)) semanticPatterns.push(/\b(kannst|solltest|könntest|empfehle|tipp|helfen|einladen|vorstellen|verein|kurs|gruppe)\b/); if (/freizeit|hobby|gern|gerne/.test(req)) semanticPatterns.push(/\b(freizeit|hobby|gerne|gern|sport|musik|lesen|kino|freunde|spazieren)\b/); if (/besuch|vorschlag|reaktion|einladen/.test(req)) semanticPatterns.push(/\b(besuch|besuchen|komm|kommen|wochenende|einladen|freue mich|lust|gern)\b/); if (semanticPatterns.length && hasAny(semanticPatterns)) hits += 2; return hits; } let contentScore = 0; if (requirements.length > 0) { const perReq = 20 / requirements.length; requirements.forEach((req, index) => { const hits = keywordHit(req); if (hits >= 2) { contentScore += perReq; } else if (hits === 1) { contentScore += perReq * 0.65; feedback.push(`Inhalt teilweise erkannt: ${req}`); } else { feedback.push(`Inhalt ergänzen: ${req}`); } }); } else { contentScore = wordCount >= 80 ? 16 : wordCount >= 50 ? 10 : wordCount > 0 ? 5 : 0; } points += add('Inhalt', contentScore, 20, contentScore >= 17 ? 'Die meisten Inhaltspunkte wurden erkannt.' : 'Nicht alle Inhaltspunkte wurden klar erkannt.'); const hasGreeting = /^(liebe|lieber|hallo|hi|guten tag|sehr geehrte|sehr geehrter)/i.test(text); const hasClosing = /(viele grüße|liebe grüße|herzliche grüße|mit freundlichen grüßen|bis bald|dein|deine|freundliche grüße)\b/i.test(text); const formScore = (hasGreeting ? 3 : 0) + (hasClosing ? 3 : 0); points += add('Form', formScore, 6, formScore === 6 ? 'Anrede und Schlussformel sind vorhanden.' : 'E-Mail-Form verbessern: Anrede und Schlussformel einbauen.'); const connectors = (lower.match(/\b(weil|aber|denn|deshalb|darum|außerdem|trotzdem|wenn|dann|zuerst|danach|auch|zum beispiel)\b/g) || []).length; const structureScore = Math.min(5, connectors + (sentences.length >= 4 ? 1 : 0)); points += add('Struktur', structureScore, 5, structureScore >= 4 ? 'Der Text ist ausreichend verbunden.' : 'Mehr Verbindungswörter nutzen: z.B. weil, aber, deshalb, außerdem.'); const punctuationCount = (text.match(/[.!?]/g) || []).length; const longUnbroken = words.some(w => w.length > 35); let languageScore = 4; if (wordCount < 30) languageScore -= 2; if (punctuationCount < 3) languageScore -= 1; if (longUnbroken) languageScore -= 1; if (sentences.length < 3) languageScore -= 1; points += add('Sprache', languageScore, 4, languageScore >= 3 ? 'Die Sprache ist für eine automatische Prüfung ausreichend lesbar.' : 'Sprache verbessern: mehr vollständige Sätze und Satzzeichen verwenden.'); points = Math.max(0, Math.min(maxPoints, Math.round(points))); return { points, maxPoints, feedback, breakdown, wordCount }; } // ===== ERGEBNISSE PAGE FUNCTIONALITY ===== function initErgebnissePage() { const CONFIG = { totals: { lesen: 105, hoeren: 75, schreiben: 45, mundlich: 75, gesamt: 300 } }; function escapeHtml(value) { return String(value ?? '') .replace(/&/g, '&') .replace(//g, '>') .replace(/"/g, '"') .replace(/'/g, '''); } function stripHtml(value) { return String(value ?? '') .replace(/<[^>]*>/g, ' ') .replace(/\s+/g, ' ') .trim(); } function shorten(value, max = 80) { const text = stripHtml(value); return text.length > max ? `${text.slice(0, max)}...` : text; } function safeAnswer(value) { return value || value === 0 ? String(value) : '-'; } function readExamResults() { try { const lesen = window._lesenState && window._lesenState.answers ? window._lesenState.answers : {}; const hoeren = {}; if (window._hoerenState && window._hoerenState.answers) { Object.keys(window._hoerenState.answers).forEach(sectionId => { const sectionAnswers = window._hoerenState.answers[sectionId] || {}; Object.keys(sectionAnswers).forEach(questionId => { hoeren[questionId] = sectionAnswers[questionId]; }); }); } let schreiben = window._schreibenState && window._schreibenState.answers ? window._schreibenState.answers : {}; if (!schreiben || !schreiben.s1) { schreiben = { s1: localStorage.getItem('schreibenAnswer_s1') || '' }; } let mundlich = { t1: 0, t2: 0, t3: 0 }; try { const rawMundlich = (window._mundlichState && window._mundlichState.scores) ? window._mundlichState.scores : JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('mundlichScores') || '{}'); mundlich.t1 = Math.max(0, Math.min(15, parseInt(rawMundlich.t1 || 0, 10))); mundlich.t2 = Math.max(0, Math.min(30, parseInt(rawMundlich.t2 || 0, 10))); mundlich.t3 = Math.max(0, Math.min(30, parseInt(rawMundlich.t3 || 0, 10))); } catch(e) {} return { lesen, hoeren, schreiben, mundlich }; } catch (e) { return { lesen: {}, hoeren: {}, schreiben: {}, mundlich: { t1: 0, t2: 0, t3: 0 } }; } } function buildSectionResult(section, items) { const correct = items.filter(item => item.user === item.correct).length; const total = items.length; const points = total > 0 ? Math.round((correct / total) * section.points) : 0; const percentage = total > 0 ? Math.round((correct / total) * 100) : 0; return { id: section.id, title: section.title, pointsMax: section.points, correct, total, points, percentage, items }; } function getLesenResultSections(answers) { return EXAM_DATA.lesen.sections.map(section => { let items = []; if (section.id === 's1') { items = section.texts.map((text, index) => { const userAnswer = safeAnswer(answers[text.id]); const userHeading = section.headings.find(h => h.id === userAnswer); const correctHeading = section.headings.find(h => h.id === text.correctAnswer); return { key: text.id, label: `Text ${String.fromCharCode(65 + index)}`, questionText: shorten(text.content, 120), user: userAnswer, correct: text.correctAnswer, userDisplay: userHeading ? `${userHeading.id}) ${userHeading.text}` : 'Nicht beantwortet', correctDisplay: correctHeading ? `${correctHeading.id}) ${correctHeading.text}` : safeAnswer(text.correctAnswer) }; }); } if (section.id === 's2') { items = section.questions.map((question, index) => { const userAnswer = safeAnswer(answers[question.id]); const userOption = question.options.find(o => o.id === userAnswer); const correctOption = question.options.find(o => o.id === question.correctAnswer); return { key: question.id, label: `Frage ${index + 6}`, questionText: question.text, user: userAnswer, correct: question.correctAnswer, userDisplay: userOption ? userOption.text : 'Nicht beantwortet', correctDisplay: correctOption ? correctOption.text : safeAnswer(question.correctAnswer) }; }); } if (section.id === 's3') { items = section.situations.map(situation => { const correctText = section.texts.find(t => t.correctAnswer === situation.id); const correctValue = correctText ? correctText.id : 'X'; const userAnswer = safeAnswer(answers[situation.id]); const userText = section.texts.find(t => t.id === userAnswer); return { key: situation.id, label: `Situation ${situation.id}`, questionText: situation.text, user: userAnswer, correct: correctValue, userDisplay: userAnswer === 'X' ? 'X - Kein passender Text' : (userText ? `${userText.id.toUpperCase()} - ${shorten(userText.text, 80)}` : 'Nicht beantwortet'), correctDisplay: correctValue === 'X' ? 'X - Kein passender Text' : `${correctText.id.toUpperCase()} - ${shorten(correctText.text, 80)}` }; }); } if (section.id === 's4') { items = section.fillBlanks.map(blank => { const userAnswer = safeAnswer(answers[blank.id]); return { key: blank.id, label: `Lücke ${blank.id}`, questionText: `Lücke ${blank.id}`, user: userAnswer, correct: blank.correctAnswer, userDisplay: userAnswer === '-' ? 'Nicht beantwortet' : userAnswer, correctDisplay: blank.correctAnswer }; }); } if (section.id === 's5') { items = section.fillBlanks2.map(blank => { const userAnswer = safeAnswer(answers[blank.id]); return { key: blank.id, label: `Lücke ${blank.id}`, questionText: `Lücke ${blank.id}`, user: userAnswer, correct: blank.correctAnswer, userDisplay: userAnswer === '-' ? 'Nicht beantwortet' : userAnswer, correctDisplay: blank.correctAnswer }; }); } return buildSectionResult(section, items); }); } function getHoerenResultSections(answers) { return EXAM_DATA.hoeren.sections.map(section => { const items = section.questions.map(question => { const userAnswer = safeAnswer(answers[question.id]); const correctAnswer = section.correctAnswers[question.id]; return { key: question.id, label: `Frage ${question.id}`, questionText: question.text, user: userAnswer, correct: correctAnswer, userDisplay: userAnswer === '-' ? 'Nicht beantwortet' : userAnswer, correctDisplay: correctAnswer }; }); return buildSectionResult(section, items); }); } function summarizeSections(sections) { return { correct: sections.reduce((sum, section) => sum + section.correct, 0), total: sections.reduce((sum, section) => sum + section.total, 0), points: sections.reduce((sum, section) => sum + section.points, 0), maxPoints: sections.reduce((sum, section) => sum + section.pointsMax, 0), sections }; } function calculateLesenResults(answers) { return summarizeSections(getLesenResultSections(answers)); } function calculateHoerenResults(answers) { return summarizeSections(getHoerenResultSections(answers)); } function calculateMundlichResults(scores) { const t1 = Math.max(0, Math.min(15, parseInt((scores && scores.t1) || 0, 10))); const t2 = Math.max(0, Math.min(30, parseInt((scores && scores.t2) || 0, 10))); const t3 = Math.max(0, Math.min(30, parseInt((scores && scores.t3) || 0, 10))); const sections = [ { title: 'Mündlich Teil 1 — Selbstvorstellung', points: t1, pointsMax: 15, correct: t1, total: 15, items: [] }, { title: 'Mündlich Teil 2 — Über ein Thema sprechen', points: t2, pointsMax: 30, correct: t2, total: 30, items: [] }, { title: 'Mündlich Teil 3 — Gemeinsam etwas planen', points: t3, pointsMax: 30, correct: t3, total: 30, items: [] } ]; return { sections, points: t1 + t2 + t3, pointsMax: 75, correct: t1 + t2 + t3, total: 75 }; } function renderMundlichDetails(result) { return `

🗣️ Mündlich — Ergebnisse pro Teil

Mündlich gesamt

${result.points}/75 Punkte
Teil 1 — Selbstvorstellung
${result.sections[0].points}/15
${result.sections[0].points >= 9 ? '✓' : '!'}
Teil 2 — Über ein Thema sprechen
${result.sections[1].points}/30
${result.sections[1].points >= 18 ? '✓' : '!'}
Teil 3 — Gemeinsam etwas planen
${result.sections[2].points}/30
${result.sections[2].points >= 18 ? '✓' : '!'}
Teil 3 ist vorbereitet. Sobald die Aufgaben eingefügt sind, kann die automatische Übung erweitert werden.
`; } function renderPartCards(sections) { return sections.map(section => `
${escapeHtml(section.title)}: ${section.points}/${section.pointsMax} Punkte — ${section.correct}/${section.total} richtig
`).join(''); } function renderDetails(title, sections) { let html = `

${escapeHtml(title)}

`; sections.forEach(section => { html += `

${escapeHtml(section.title)}

${section.points}/${section.pointsMax} Punkte
${section.correct} von ${section.total} richtig (${section.percentage}%)
`; section.items.forEach(item => { const isCorrect = item.user === item.correct; const rowClass = isCorrect ? 'correct-answer' : 'incorrect-answer'; html += ` `; }); html += `
Nr. Aufgabe Ihre Antwort Richtige Antwort Ergebnis
${escapeHtml(item.label)} ${escapeHtml(item.questionText)} ${escapeHtml(item.userDisplay)} ${escapeHtml(item.correctDisplay)} ${isCorrect ? '✅' : '❌'}
`; }); html += '
'; return html; } function renderSchreibenDetails(schreibenAnswers, schreibenResult) { const answer = schreibenAnswers['s1'] || ''; const feedbackList = schreibenResult.feedback.map(f => `
  • ${escapeHtml(f)}
    • `).join(''); const breakdownRows = schreibenResult.breakdown.map(row => ` ${escapeHtml(row.label)} ${row.score}/${row.max} ${escapeHtml(row.note || '')} `).join(''); return `

    ✍️ Schreiben — Automatische Bewertung

    ${schreibenResult.points}/${schreibenResult.maxPoints} Punkte
    ${schreibenResult.wordCount} Wörter — automatisch bewertet

    Ihre Antwort:

    ${escapeHtml(answer || 'Keine Antwort vorhanden')}

    Punkteaufteilung:

    ${breakdownRows}
    KriteriumPunkteHinweis

    Feedback:

      ${feedbackList}
    `; } function renderFinalSummary(totalPoints) { const percentage = Math.round((totalPoints / CONFIG.totals.gesamt) * 100); document.getElementById('finalSummary-ergebnisse').innerHTML = `
    Gesamtergebnis: ${totalPoints}/${CONFIG.totals.gesamt} Punkte
    Lesen + Hören + Schreiben + Mündlich
    ${percentage}%
    Bestanden: ${percentage >= 60 ? '✅ Ja' : '❌ Nein'}
    `; } function calculateResults() { const st = readExamResults(); const details = document.getElementById('details-ergebnisse'); const tiles = document.getElementById('topTiles-ergebnisse'); details.innerHTML = ''; tiles.innerHTML = ''; const lesenResults = calculateLesenResults(st.lesen); const hoerenResults = calculateHoerenResults(st.hoeren); const schreibenSection = EXAM_DATA.schreiben.sections[0]; const schreibenResult = autoEvaluateSchreiben(st.schreiben['s1'] || '', schreibenSection); const schreibenScore = schreibenResult.points; const mundlichResults = calculateMundlichResults(st.mundlich); tiles.innerHTML = `

    Lesen

    ${lesenResults.points}/${CONFIG.totals.lesen} Punkte
    Total: ${lesenResults.correct}/${lesenResults.total} richtig
    ${renderPartCards(lesenResults.sections)}

    Hören

    ${hoerenResults.points}/${CONFIG.totals.hoeren} Punkte
    Total: ${hoerenResults.correct}/${hoerenResults.total} richtig
    ${renderPartCards(hoerenResults.sections)}

    Schreiben

    ${schreibenScore}/${CONFIG.totals.schreiben} Punkte
    Automatische Bewertung

    Mündlich

    ${mundlichResults.points}/${CONFIG.totals.mundlich} Punkte
    Teil 1: ${mundlichResults.sections[0].points}/15 · Teil 2: ${mundlichResults.sections[1].points}/30 · Teil 3: ${mundlichResults.sections[2].points}/30
    `; details.innerHTML = `

    📊 Alle Ergebnisse

    Hier sehen Sie alle Teile einzeln: Lesen S1–S5, Hören Teil 1–3, Schreiben und Mündlich. Der Total wird erst am Ende zusammengerechnet.
    ${renderDetails('📖 Lesen — Ergebnisse pro Teil', lesenResults.sections)} ${renderDetails('🎧 Hören — Ergebnisse pro Teil', hoerenResults.sections)} ${renderSchreibenDetails(st.schreiben, schreibenResult)} ${renderMundlichDetails(mundlichResults)} `; const totalCompletePoints = lesenResults.points + hoerenResults.points + schreibenScore + mundlichResults.points; renderFinalSummary(totalCompletePoints); if (window.dkSendCompleteExamResult) { window.dkSendCompleteExamResult({ totalPoints: totalCompletePoints, maxScore: CONFIG.totals.gesamt, sectionScores: { lesen: { points: lesenResults.points, max: CONFIG.totals.lesen, correct: lesenResults.correct, total: lesenResults.total }, hoeren: { points: hoerenResults.points, max: CONFIG.totals.hoeren, correct: hoerenResults.correct, total: hoerenResults.total }, schreiben: { points: schreibenScore, max: CONFIG.totals.schreiben, wordCount: schreibenResult.wordCount }, mundlich: { points: mundlichResults.points, max: CONFIG.totals.mundlich } }, details: { lesen: lesenResults, hoeren: hoerenResults, schreiben: schreibenResult, mundlich: mundlichResults } }); } // Schreiben wird automatisch bewertet, daher ist keine manuelle Speichern-Schaltfläche mehr nötig. } document.getElementById('backBtn-ergebnisse').onclick = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); examStarted = false; counter = initialCounter; timerEl.textContent = counter; timeDisplayEl.textContent = counter; progressEl.style.transform = "scaleX(0)"; timerEl.style.color = ""; showPage('start-page'); }; document.getElementById('retryBtn-ergebnisse').onclick = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); if (window._lesenState) { window._lesenState.answers = {}; window._lesenState.marked = {}; window._lesenState.showResults = false; window._lesenState.remaining = EXAM_DATA.lesen.durationSec; if (window._lesenState.timerInterval) clearInterval(window._lesenState.timerInterval); } if (window._hoerenState) { window._hoerenState.answers = {}; window._hoerenState.showResults = false; window._hoerenState.remaining = EXAM_DATA.hoeren.durationSec; if (window._hoerenState.timerInterval) clearInterval(window._hoerenState.timerInterval); } if (window._schreibenState) { window._schreibenState.answers = {}; window._schreibenState.showResults = false; window._schreibenState.remaining = EXAM_DATA.schreiben.durationSec; if (window._schreibenState.timerInterval) clearInterval(window._schreibenState.timerInterval); } localStorage.removeItem('schreibenPoints'); localStorage.removeItem('schreibenAnswer_s1'); localStorage.removeItem('mundlichScores'); if (window._mundlichState) { window._mundlichState.scores = { t1: 0, t2: 0, t3: 0 }; } examStarted = false; const selectedSection = document.getElementById("sectionSelect").value; if (selectedSection === 'lesen') showPage('lesen-page'); else if (selectedSection === 'hoeren') showPage('hoeren-page'); else if (selectedSection === 'schreiben') showPage('schreiben-page'); else if (selectedSection === 'mundlich') showPage('mundlich-page'); }; document.getElementById('continueBtn-ergebnisse').onclick = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); if (window._mundlichState && window._mundlichState.scores && (window._mundlichState.scores.t1 || window._mundlichState.scores.t2 || window._mundlichState.scores.t3)) showPage('mundlich-page'); else if (window._schreibenState && Object.keys(window._schreibenState.answers).length > 0) showPage('schreiben-page'); else if (window._hoerenState && Object.keys(window._hoerenState.answers).length > 0) showPage('hoeren-page'); else if (window._lesenState && Object.keys(window._lesenState.answers).length > 0) showPage('lesen-page'); else showPage('lesen-page'); }; calculateResults(); } // تحسين نظام السحب والإفلات للشاشات التي تعمل باللمس function setupTouchDragAndDrop() { if ('ontouchstart' in window) { document.querySelectorAll('[draggable="true"]').forEach(item => { item.addEventListener('touchstart', handleTouchStart); item.addEventListener('touchend', handleTouchEnd); }); document.querySelectorAll('.title-slot, .blank-slot').forEach(slot => { slot.addEventListener('touchmove', handleTouchMove); slot.addEventListener('touchend', handleTouchDrop); }); } } function handleTouchStart(e) { // تنفيذ السحب عند اللمس } // استدعاء الدالة عند تحميل الصفحة document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', setupTouchDragAndDrop); ↩ Prüfung komplett
